Athens Tiare Hotel

★★★★☆
🍸 Rooftop Bar
from €130 /night
Check Availability

Overview

Modern hotel in the heart of Athens' nightlife district. Great rooftop for evening drinks.

Who Should Consider Athens Tiare Hotel

Athens Tiare Hotel is a 4-star mid-range price-signal hotel in Psyrri, with no Acropolis-view signal in the current dataset and a rooftop-bar signal. It is tagged for nightlife, young travelers, value.

  • Compare the area on the Psyrri hotel guide.
  • See broader criteria-based picks in Best Hotels in Athens.
  • Compare it with other Athens rooftop bar hotels.

RooftopBarWiFiBreakfast

✓ Pros

  • Nightlife location
  • Modern rooms
  • Good value

✗ Cons

  • Street noise
  • Basic breakfast

Location

Located in Psyrri, 10-15 min walk to the Acropolis.

🏛️ 10-15 min to Acropolis
🚇 5-10 min to metro
